StepLearningEventsConfig.description: Per-node learning-event emission metadata (v4.2 inventory delta).

emits.description: Whether this node emits learning events at runtime.
emits.title: Emits

event_types.description: Event-type strings this node may emit (open-set; validated by capture layer).
event_types.title: Event Types

schema_ref.description: Optional per-node override of the top-level learning-event schema_ref.
schema_ref.title: Schema Ref

StepLearningEventsConfig.title: StepLearningEventsConfig

description:
One node in the compiled `StateGraph`.

Architecture-canonical fields: `id`, `specialist_id`, `scaffold_node`,
`model_config_ref`. v4.2 inventory deltas ride under the explicit
extensibility trailing from AC-1.4-A: `label`, `gate`, `gate_code`,
`sub_phase_of`, `insertion_after`, `hud_tracked`, `pack_section_anchor`,
`pack_version`, `rationale`, `learning_events`.

dependencies.description: Manifest-declared dependency map for production composition. Keys are downstream specialist input keys; values are upstream specialist ids. Missing or empty maps use the runner's permanent fallback resolution.
dependencies.title: Dependencies

gate.description: Whether this step is a HIL gate (v4.2 manifest).
gate.title: Gate

insertion_after.description: Prior step id for linear-chain ordering (v4.2 manifest). Story 1.6 synthesizes `EdgeSpec` entries from this field when migrating the real v4.2 manifest.
insertion_after.title: Insertion After

model_config_ref.description: Repo-relative path to a `model_config.yaml` file. Compiler validates presence at compile time (NFR-M2 / FR25). `None` skips the lint pass.
model_config_ref.title: Model Config Ref

rationale.description: Free-text rationale (stored verbatim; NO min_length per checklist §6).
rationale.title: Rationale

scaffold_node.description: Which scaffold-node slot (of the 9-node specialist scaffold) this node represents. Slab 2 concept; optional in Slab 1.
scaffold_node.title: Scaffold Node

specialist_id.description: Specialist identifier the compiler resolves to a callable. Slab 1 uses a passthrough stub; full resolution is Slab 2 Story 2a.1 scope.
specialist_id.title: Specialist Id

sub_phase_of.description: Parent step id for nested sub-phases (v4.2 manifest).
sub_phase_of.title: Sub Phase Of

title: NodeSpec
